name: Yesware Sales Engagement API
what_it_does: Email-based sales engagement platform with REST API — providing email tracking (opens, clicks, replies), email templates, campaigns, meeting scheduler, and reporting for sales teams, with native Gmail and Outlook integrations for SDR and AE workflows.
use_cases: Querying email tracking activity (opens, clicks, replies) for sales activity dashboards
Managing email campaign performance metrics for SDR team reporting
Integrating Yesware activity data with Salesforce via native sync for complete activity logging
Pulling email template performance data to optimize sales messaging
Automating prospect follow-up triggers based on email engagement events via webhook
not_for: High-volume cold email at scale with inbox rotation (use Instantly.ai)
Transactional email sending (use Postmark or SendGrid)
Full multi-channel sequences with LinkedIn and phone (use Outreach or Salesloft)
best_when: A sales team using Gmail or Outlook wants lightweight email tracking, templates, and campaign analytics without the complexity and cost of a full sales engagement platform.
avoid_when: You need multi-channel sequences (LinkedIn, calls), high-volume cold email with inbox warming, or advanced AI-driven engagement features.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Access tokens scoped per user. Webhook for email events (open, click, reply). Gmail and Outlook OAuth required for email operations. Salesforce OAuth for CRM sync. Multi-layer OAuth typical for full integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan with limited tracking and templates
pricing.notes: Boston-based company. Founded 2010. Acquired by Vendasta 2022. Pioneer in email tracking for sales. Both Gmail and Outlook support — differentiator vs Gmail-only competitors. Salesforce AppExchange native app. Meeting scheduler built-in. Strong in SMB sales teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for tracking data, campaigns, templates, and reports. OAuth2 auth. Moderate developer documentation. Vendasta acquisition may affect API roadmap. Gmail and Outlook OAuth required separately. Webhook for engagement events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Tracking reads idempotent. Campaign reads idempotent. Template reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range.
known_agent_gotchas: Vendasta acquisition (2022) — API roadmap and documentation may be in flux
OAuth2 required — more complex auth flow than API key competitors
Gmail and Outlook OAuth required separately for email operations
Email tracking requires image loading by recipient — open rates undercounted
Free tier has limited API access — verify plan capabilities before integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 auth. Email tracking behavioral data is PII — implement data retention policies. Gmail and Outlook OAuth tokens require secure storage. Vendasta acquisition introduces supply chain consideration.
